titleStmt.title: SII 41.367: original edition by S. Rajagopal

No. 367. (A.R. No. 582 of 1905.) Vijayamaṅgalam, Erode Taluk, Coimbatore District. On the west wall right of the entrance of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Nāgēśvarasvāmi temple in Vijayamaṅgalam.

p.hi: Koṅgu, Parakēśari Kōṉērmaikoṇḍāṉ, Year 3 = c. 12th Century.

summary.p: End portion not available. Registers a royal order addressed to the śivabrāhamaṇas and temple managers of the temples in number of nāḍus and towns. The purport is not known as the end portion is not available. The places included Rājarājapuram, an aḍikkīḻttaḷam in Naraiyanūr-nāḍu, Tiruppāṇḍikkoḍumuḍi, and some eighteen nāḍus including Pongalūrkkā-nāḍu, Teṉkarai-nāḍu, Aṇḍanāḍu, Talaiyūr-nāḍu, Vaḍakarai-Maṇali-nāḍu, Kiḻanga-nāḍu, Vengala-nāḍu, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīparakeśari svastiśrī tribhuvaṉa ccakravatti koṉermai koṇṭān vaṭako
ṅkil naraiyaṉūr ṉāṭṭu Aṭikkiḻttaḷamāna rājarājapuramum poṅkalūkkā ṉā
ṭum teṉkarai nāṭumaṇṭa nāṭum talaiyūrṉāṭum vaṭakarai maṇali ṉāṭum
ṉāṭum kiḻaṅkaṉāṭum veṅkala nāṭum taṭṭaiyūr ṉāṭumiṭaippuḻuti ṉāṭum kāṅka
yaṉāṭum viracoḻavaḷaṉāṭum valuppukkāṉāṭum kuṟuppunāṭum vaṭaparicāra nāṭum kāñci
kkūvaṉāṭum pūnturaiṉāṭum kiḻpparai nāṭum vaṭakarai ṉāṭum Iṉṉāṭukaḷil
śivabrāhmaṇakkāṇiyāḷarkkum tānattāṟkum tiruppāṇṭik koṭumuṭit tānatIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 41.367 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
